steps.title: Compare the two statements
steps.content: The first sentence gives Sierra Leone's rise in urbanization from 2015 to 2020. The second sentence broadens that same trend to West Africa as a whole during the same period.

steps.title: Test the transition
steps.content: A signals simultaneity but does not frame the regional sentence as a reworded broader statement. B would make the regional trend an example of Sierra Leone's trend, which reverses the scale. D signals a later development. The needed transition presents the second sentence as a restatement of the trend. The answer is C.
